name: Golden Mustard Mehendi Lehenga
description: A bright mustard lehenga with heavy gota patti and sequin detailing, perfect for daytime functions like Mehendi or Haldi.
stylistNotes: Minimal jewelry recommended to let the color shine through.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Iron on low heat.

name: Multi-Color Patchwork Lehenga
description: A multi-colored patchwork lehenga in earthy tones with mirror work and sequin embellishments.
stylistNotes: Best for a boho-themed wedding event. Pair with oxidized jewelry.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Avoid rough handling of embroidered patches.

name: Classic Rajasthani Bandhani Lehenga
description: Heavy Rajasthani-style lehenga with intricate Bandhani work and a rich red dupatta, ideal for sangeet or engagement ceremonies.
stylistNotes: Perfect with antique gold jewelry and green bangles for a vibrant cultural touch.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Steam press only.

name: Peach Mirror Work Gown Lehenga
description: Modern peach net lehenga with mirror work and sheer overlay, giving a contemporary twist to the traditional silhouette.
stylistNotes: Glam it up with soft curls and a neutral-toned clutch.
materialCare: Store folded inside out. Dry clean recommended.

name: Vintage Rose Bridal Lehenga
description: A royal rose-pink lehenga intricately embroidered with golden zari and floral motifs, ideal for a day wedding ceremony.
stylistNotes: Pair with heavy Kundan jewelry and floral hair bun for a regal look.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Store in garment bag away from direct sunlight.
